title: NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Chief Executive Officer, Incubation Manager and More Posts
organization: NITS Foundation for Innovation Incubation and Incubation
post_name: Chief Executive Officer, Incubation Manager, Incubation Associate
short_info: National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar) Chief Executive Officer, Incubation Manager, Incubation Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 23 May 2026 on the official website of National Institute of Technology Silchar. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Silchar Chief Executive Officer, Incubation Manager, Incubation Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Chief Executive Officer: Less than 50 years Incubation Manager: Less than 45 years Incubation Associate: Less than 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree or higher in Engineering/Technology/Pharmacy, Bachelor's degree or higher in Science with an MBA, Bachelor's degree or higher in Engineering/Technology/Science/Business/Management
qualification.details: Chief Executive Officer: Bachelor's degree or higher in Engineering/Technology/Pharmacy from a recognized University/Institute (preference for additional MBA or equivalent postgraduate management degree) or Bachelor's degree or higher in Science with an MBA or postgraduate management degree. Incubation Manager: Bachelor's degree or higher in Engineering/Technology/Science/Business/Management from a recognized University/Institute (preference for additional MBA or equivalent). Incubation Associate: Bachelor's degree or higher in Engineering/Technology/Science/Business/Management from a recognized University/Institute.

salary_details.pay_scale: CEO: Rs. 80,000/month, Manager: Rs. 40,000/month, Associate: Rs. 30,000/month
salary_details.details: Chief Executive Officer: Rs. 80,000/month Incubation Manager: Rs. 40,000/month Incubation Associate: Rs. 30,000/month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026 is 08-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the posts of Chief Executive Officer, Incubation Manager, and Incubation Associate in the NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026 is via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Chief Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Chief Executive Officer post in NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026 is Rs. 80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Incubation Associate post?
faq.answer: For the Incubation Associate post, candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree or higher in Engineering/Technology/Science/Business/Management from a recognized University/Institute.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the posts announced in NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for the Incubation Manager post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Incubation Manager post is less than 45 years.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Official Notification PDF' link provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar).
